Short CV

Neriman KİLİT graduated from Maltepe University Faculty of Medicine. KİLİT completed her medical specialty in Trakya University Faculty of Medicine Department of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry between 2015-2017 and she completed simultaneously her medical specialty education in Eskişehir Osmangazi University Faculty of Medicine between 2015-2017.
